chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 122 – Arrival of Abu Ja’far Muhammad Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup> (9<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/104)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/104)

parts.text: دِعْبِلِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ أَنَّهُ دَخَلَ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )

text: فَقَالَ لَهُ لِمَ لَمْ تَحْمَدِ اللَّهَ قَالَ ثُمَّ دَخَلْتُ بَعْدُ عَلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَمَرَ لِي بِشَيْ‏ءٍ فَقُلْتُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَقَالَ لِي تَأَدَّبْتَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Di’bal Bin Ali that,

‘He went over to Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> ordered something for him, so he did not Praise Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘Why did you not Praise Allah<sup>azwj</sup>: ‘Then I went over to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> (9<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) afterwards and he<sup>asws</sup> ordered something for me, so I said, ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You have been disciplined’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father who has said the following. “Once a group of Shi‘a from the suburbs asked permission to meet abu Ja‘far (a.s.). He granted them permission and they came in his presence. In one meeting they asked him thirty thousand questions. He answered them all and at that time he was ten years old.”
